vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at spar attachment due to thin wall thickness.
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness at spar attachment to improve structural integrity.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for door hinge operation may impede equipment bay access.
risk.mit: Increase clearance around door hinge to ensure smooth operation.

risk.desc: Cooling inlet may not provide adequate airflow for motor pod cooling.
risk.mit: Increase size of cooling inlet to enhance airflow.

risk.desc: Inspection window may be obstructed by surrounding features, limiting visibility.
risk.mit: Adjust position of inspection window to ensure clear visibility.

risk.desc: Fastener patterns may not align with load direction, leading to potential failure.
risk.mit: Ensure fastener patterns align with load direction to prevent failure.

risk.desc: Monolithic body may hide removable modules, datums, or inspection paths.
risk.mit: Ensure parts are integrated only when service access, inspection, and interface clarity remain visible.

risk.desc: Joints are described in prose but not represented as holes, bosses, pins, slots, or datums.

risk.desc: Design has no callouts, access windows, labels, datum pads, or verification focus.
risk.mit: Include clear callouts and labels in the design.

risk.desc: Fasteners appear as bare holes with no locking, washer, engagement-length, or preload language anywhere.
risk.mit: Ensure all fasteners have visible locking and preload evidence.

risk.desc: Verification is generic pass/warn text not tied to features.

generated_parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
generated_parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

requirements: Design a GPS and Pitot Boom subsystem for a fixed-wing UAV with a 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance, and a focus on signal separation and harness visibility.
Subsystem must interface with avionics bay, wing structure, and air data system.
GPS signal path from GPS receiver to antenna must be clear and separate from telemetry signal path.
Pitot boom must connect to static port with clear airflow path.
Electronics must be mounted with clearances and strain relief for cables.

verify.rule: Ensure all required features are present in the part_tree/geometry_ops.
Ensure the subsystem mass does not exceed the allocated budget.
Ensure each physical feature in the geometry_ops can be traced back to a specific requirement in the part_tree.
Ensure all interfaces are reciprocal and clearly defined.
Ensure all critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential interference between GPS antenna and telemetry signal cables.
risk.mit: Increase separation distance between GPS and telemetry channels.

risk.desc: Cable strain relief may be inadequate in some areas.
risk.mit: Add strain relief features at all cable exits and bends.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around telemetry board connectors.
risk.mit: Increase clearance around telemetry board connectors.

risk.desc: Potential for mis-mating due to unlabeled connectors.
risk.mit: Label all connectors and ensure keying or unique shapes.

risk.desc: GPS mount may not be securely fastened to the wing structure.
risk.mit: Add visible locking evidence and ensure proper preload.

generated_parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
generated_parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

requirements: Power flows from the battery pack through the BMS to the XT60 connector for external power management.
Heat generated by the battery pack is dissipated through the wing core material.
The battery bay slides along a rail attached to the wing structure for easy installation and removal.

risk.desc: Potential thermal management issues due to heat dissipation through wing core material.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks or additional cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference due to harness routing.
